# Shubook Labs

Podcast recording and content creation studio in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India.

---

## About

[Shubook Labs](https://www.shubook.in) is a podcast recording and content creation studio located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. We help creators, businesses, founders, educators, coaches, and brands produce professional podcasts, video podcasts, interviews, and digital content.

---

## Services

We offer end-to-end podcast and content production solutions:

- **Full Production:** Podcast Recording, Video Production, Editing, Publishing, and Strategy. ([View all services](https://www.shubook.in/services/))
- **Studio Rental:** Hourly and daily rental options for creators. ([Learn more](https://www.shubook.in/podcast-studio-on-rent/))

---

## Location

**Jaipur, Rajasthan, India**

---

## Contact

- **Phone:** +91 98872 47112
- **Email:** [Contact form](https://www.shubook.in/contact/) – For bookings and inquiries.
